###############################################################################
#  KEYBINDINGS — ohmychadwm (chadwm fork)
#  Source: ~/.config/ohmychadwm/chadwm/config.def.h  (no compiled config.h present)
#          + ~/.config/ohmychadwm/sxhkd/sxhkdrc
#  Tags use the AZERTY (Belgium) keysyms; the qwerty TAGKEYS are commented out.
#  Generated: 2026.05.29 by /kiro-create-keybindings — DO NOT EDIT BY HAND
###############################################################################

── 1. Applications & Launchers ───────────────────────────────────────────────
  super + Return              alacritty (terminal)
  super + t                   alacritty (terminal)
  super + KP_Enter            alacritty (terminal)
  ctrl + alt + Return         alacritty (terminal)
  ctrl + alt + t              alacritty (terminal)
  F12                         alacritty (terminal)
  super + shift + Return      thunar (file manager)
  super + shift + KP_Enter    thunar (file manager)
  super + d                   rofi drun (themed launcher)
  super + r                   rofi drun (themed launcher)
  super + space               rofi drun (themed launcher)
  super + F11                 rofi drun (themed launcher)
  super + F12                 rofi drun (themed launcher)
  super + shift + d           dmenu_run
  super + F1                  vivaldi (browser)
  ctrl + alt + v              vivaldi (browser)
  ctrl + alt + b              brave (browser)
  ctrl + alt + c              chromium
  ctrl + alt + g              chromium
  ctrl + alt + f              firefox
  ctrl + alt + o              opera
  super + e                   code (VSCode)
  super + F2                  code (VSCode)
  super + F3                  inkscape
  super + F4                  gimp
  super + F5                  meld
  super + F6                  vlc
  super + F7                  virtualbox
  super + F9                  lollypop (audio player)
  super + F10                 spotify
  ctrl + alt + s              spotify
  ctrl + alt + d              obs
  ctrl + alt + e              archlinux-tweak-tool
  ctrl + alt + a              alacritty-tweak-tool
  ctrl + alt + q              alacritty-tweak-tool
  ctrl + alt + p              pamac-manager
  ctrl + alt + m              mintstick (USB image writer)
  ctrl + alt + , (comma)      mintstick (USB image writer)
  ctrl + alt + End            btop (in alacritty)
  alt + F2                    xfce4-appfinder (collapsed)
  alt + F3                    xfce4-appfinder
  super + k                   show this keybindings cheatsheet

── 2. Window Management ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  super + q                   close focused window
  super + shift + q           close focused window
  super + shift + c           close focused window
  super + ctrl + q            close ALL windows on tag
  super + f                   toggle fullscreen
  super + b                   toggle bar
  super + shift + space       toggle bar
  super + ctrl + w            toggle tabbed mode
  super + ctrl + shift + Return  zoom (promote window to master)
  super + shift + j           move window down in stack
  super + shift + k           move window up in stack
  super + ctrl + j            rotate stack forward
  super + ctrl + k            rotate stack backward
  super + alt + o             increase window opacity
  super + alt + shift + o     decrease window opacity
  super + shift + Escape      xkill (click a window to force-kill)
  ctrl + alt + Delete         close all windows (killall)

── 3. Workspaces / Tags / Groups ─────────────────────────────────────────────
  super + 1..9                view tag 1–9   (AZERTY number row: & é " ' ( § è ! ç)
  super + ctrl + 1..9         toggle tag 1–9 visibility
  super + shift + 1..9        move window to tag 1–9
  super + ctrl + shift + 1..9 toggle tag 1–9 on the focused window
  super + a (agrave / à)      view all tags
  super + shift + a (à)       set window on all tags
  super + Tab                 toggle to previous tag
  super + Left                previous tag (shiftview)
  super + Right               next tag (shiftview)

── 4. Layout & Tiling ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  super + ctrl + F1..F12      select layout 1–12
  super + ctrl + m            cycle layout (next)
  super + ctrl + p            cycle layout (previous)
  super + i                   more master windows
  super + n                   fewer master windows
  super + l                   grow master area width
  super + h                   shrink master area width
  super + shift + h           grow focused window (cfact)
  super + shift + l           shrink focused window (cfact)
  super + shift + o           reset focused window size
  super + ctrl + t            toggle gaps
  super + ctrl + i            increase gaps (all)
  super + ctrl + d            decrease gaps (all)
  super + shift + i           increase inner gaps
  super + ctrl + shift + i    decrease inner gaps
  super + ctrl + o            increase outer gaps
  super + ctrl + shift + o    decrease outer gaps
  super + ctrl + shift + d    reset gaps to default
  super + ctrl + § è ! ç      fine inner/outer H/V gaps (+shift to decrease)
  super + shift + minus       decrease border width
  super + shift + p           increase border width
  super + shift + w           reset border width

── 5. Multi-monitor ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  super + , (comma)           focus previous monitor
  super + ; (semicolon)       focus next monitor
  super + shift + Left        send window to previous monitor
  super + shift + Right       send window to next monitor

── 6. Multimedia & Hardware ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
  XF86AudioRaiseVolume        volume +10%
  XF86AudioLowerVolume        volume -10%
  XF86AudioMute               toggle mute
  XF86AudioPlay               play / pause (playerctl)
  XF86AudioNext               next track
  XF86AudioPrev               previous track
  XF86AudioStop               stop
  XF86MonBrightnessUp         brightness +10
  XF86MonBrightnessDown       brightness -10
  super + v                   pavucontrol (audio mixer)
  ctrl + alt + u              pavucontrol (audio mixer)

── 7. Screenshots ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  super + u                   region screenshot → clipboard (maim --select)
  super + ctrl + u            full screenshot → clipboard (maim)
  Print                       scrot — full screen, saved to Pictures
  ctrl + Print                xfce4-screenshooter
  ctrl + shift + Print        gnome-screenshot (interactive)
  ctrl + super + Print        flameshot gui (region)

── 8. System & Session ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  super + x                   archlinux-logout
  ctrl + alt + k              archlinux-logout
  ctrl + alt + l              archlinux-logout
  super + Escape              ohmychadwm system menu
  alt + x                     ohmychadwm system menu
  alt + shift + x             ohmychadwm system menu
  super + shift + x           edu-powermenu
  super + shift + r           restart chadwm
  super + ctrl + shift + r    rebuild chadwm (rebuild.sh)
  ctrl + alt + shift + Delete quit / exit the window manager
  ctrl + shift + Escape       xfce4-taskmanager
  ctrl + alt + shift + F1     update-system
  super + ctrl + shift + F1   update-system
  super + g                   toggle compositor (fastcompmgr)
  super + p                   toggle compositor (picom)
  alt + r                     rofi-theme-selector
  alt + n                     wallpaper: next (variety)
  alt + p                     wallpaper: previous
  alt + t                     wallpaper: trash
  alt + f                     wallpaper: favorite
  alt + Right                 wallpaper: next
  alt + Left                  wallpaper: previous
  alt + Up                    wallpaper: pause rotation
  alt + Down                  wallpaper: resume rotation
  super + ctrl + space        wallpaper: selector
  alt + shift + n             wallpaper: next + pywal recolor
  alt + shift + p             wallpaper: previous + pywal recolor
  alt + shift + t             wallpaper: trash + pywal recolor
  alt + shift + f             wallpaper: favorite + pywal recolor
  alt + shift + u             pywal: recolor from current wallpaper
